text.title: Semver Split: Renovate Auto-Merges Patch/Minor, AI Agent Owns Major + Breaking
text.summary: Patch and minor with high Merge-Confidence auto-merge through Renovate; major bumps and vulnerable packages get a `agent-fixable` label that hands off to the LLM coding agent.

section.title: Split rule
section.p: The split is by semver-update-type plus Merge-Confidence score. Patch and minor with `mergeConfidence >= "high"` and green CI auto-merge; major bumps land with the `agent-fixable` label so an LLM agent picks them up and opens the breaking-change PR.

rule.statement: Renovate config MUST include two `packageRules`: (a) `matchUpdateTypes: [patch, minor]` with `automerge: true`, `automergeType: branch`, `platformAutomerge: true` (Mend Merge-Confidence "high"); (b) `matchUpdateTypes: [major]` with `labels: [agent-fixable]` and `automerge: false`. A coding-agent workflow MUST listen for the `agent-fixable` label and hand the PR to a designated agent (Copilot Coding Agent, Claude, Codex, Devin).
rule.rationale: Renovate's deterministic merge succeeds on >90% of patch-bumps when CI is green; the Merge-Confidence layer eliminates the silent-regression class. Agents are far cheaper to invoke once on the breaking 10% than to reason about every dep bump. GitHub's April 2026 Dependabot→Agent handoff formalises this exact pattern.

example.note: Patch+minor auto-merge; major bumps and vulnerability alerts hand off to the agent.
Major auto-merge regularly breaks call-sites that no human or agent reviewed.

antipattern.description: Routing every bump (patch, minor, major) through the AI agent "for safety".
antipattern.reason: Burns agent tokens on the deterministic 90%, slows the pipeline, and increases the surface for prompt-injection attacks via release notes.

section.reference: Renovate config with semver split and agent label.
Dependabot alert → coding agent assignment workflow.
Mend Renovate — Merge-Confidence and 90+ package managers.
Renovate documentation — config recipes, auto-merge gating.
GitHub changelog — Dependabot alerts assignable to AI agents.
Runtime vulnerability context → MCP → Copilot agent → PR.
